edge_hypothesis: KAMA's adaptive speed naturally flattens when momentum exhausts. When Vortex simultaneously crosses, it confirms a regime transition at the precise exhaustion point. This combines the two most successful ACCEPT families (KAMA: speed-adaptation PF=1.857, Vortex: transition-detection PF=2.034) in a novel pairing that detects the moment of trend exhaustion. The kama_vortex_divergence template has never been backtested — this is the first test of whether combining these two proven edge mechanisms compounds their alpha.

variants.name: kama_vortex_exhaust_8to1
variants.description: KAMA adaptive baseline + Vortex transition crossover. 8:1 R:R proven sweet spot.
exit_rules: Exit on opposite Vortex crossover signal.
Exit on max bars in trade threshold.
risk_rules: Risk note: ATR-based stop and TP for deterministic execution.
Risk note: risk per trade target is 1%.
8:1 R:R proven sweet spot across all ACCEPTs.

components.notes: Adaptive MA — flattens when momentum exhausts, providing natural exhaustion detection
Transition detection — VTXP/VTXM crossover signals regime shift
